page_metadata.biotools__summary: A network based statistical learning method to infer the putative functions of proteins from the known functions of its neighboring proteins on a PPI network. It identifies such proteins often involved in the same or similar biological functions.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: A network based statistical learning method to infer the putative functions of proteins from the known functions of its neighboring proteins on a PPI network. It identifies such proteins often involved in the same or similar biological functions.
